"E:\visual studio\chanpin\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\StudentTopicSystemServer.dir/objects.a
E:\QT6.10\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\StudentTopicSystemServer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\StudentTopicSystemServer.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\QT6.10\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\StudentTopicSystemServer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o StudentTopicSystemServer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libStudentTopicSystemServer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\StudentTopicSystemServer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
